donorDashboard.title: Donor Hub
donorDashboard.subtitle: Manage and track your surplus food contributions efficiently
donorDashboard.noDonationsSub: You haven't posted any food surplus listings yet. Click the "Add Donation" button above to share quality nutritious meals.

addDonation.title: Post Surplus Food
addDonation.subtitle: Share premium quality meal resources with volunteer associations
addDonation.successMsg: Donation posted successfully! Informing matched area volunteers...
addDonation.foodNamePlaceholder: e.g. Freshly packed lentil wraps & soup
addDonation.instructionsPlaceholder: Provide temperature requirements, allergens details or guidelines for pick-up agents here...
addDonation.imageLoaded: Image loaded successfully. Click to replace.
addDonation.imageDrop: Click to select or drag & drop image illustration
addDonation.imageFormats: Compatible standard formats: JPEG, PNG, WEBP

volunteerDashboard.title: Volunteer Operations
volunteerDashboard.subtitle: Acquire pickups, route cargo, and deliver nutritious surplus food to NGO sites
volunteerDashboard.errorAuth: You must be signed in as a volunteer to accept cargo.
volunteerDashboard.errorAccept: Unable to accept cargo. Please try again.
volunteerDashboard.noActiveTasks: No active pick-up logs found. Review and claim food packages waiting in the sidebar feed on your right.
volunteerDashboard.claimSub: The following food donations have been verified. Accept transport to route cargo safely.
volunteerDashboard.noSurplus: All local food surplus has been accounted for!

ngoDashboard.title: NGO Partner Hub
ngoDashboard.subtitle: Claim, track, and coordinate redistribution of available meals in your city

availableTab.title: Surplus Ready to Claim
availableTab.noSurplusSub: Matched area donor resources are empty right now. Active notifications will trigger instantly when donors share surplus food.

claimedTab.title: Claimed Listings in Dispatch
claimedTab.noActiveSub: You haven't claimed or accepted any pending food items yet. Match with available listings to start redistributing.

historyTab.title: Successfully Distributed Listings
historyTab.noHistorySub: Complete distribution actions or change status values to view metrics on finished donation records here.

adminDashboard.title: Admin Control Center
adminDashboard.subtitle: Real-time statistics, data visualization, and community audit trail.

charts.trendSub: Total new surplus food listings shared over the last week
charts.statusSub: Breakdown of current donation workflow states

donationList.title: Surplus Food Registry
donationList.subtitle: Review, coordinate, and claim active community surplus food listings near your area
donationList.emptySub: We couldn't locate any active food logs matching your current filters. Change filters to explore other surplus logs.

donationDetails.title: Surplus Log Details
donationDetails.errorNotFound: This food logs could not be loaded.
donationDetails.noMedia: No media uploaded for this surplus food
donationDetails.noInstructions: The donor did not provide any extra notes or specifics for this food listing.
donationDetails.noMessages1: No messages in this coordination channel yet.
donationDetails.noMessages2: Send a message below to start planning pickup logistics!
donationDetails.acceptDesc: Claiming this donation locks the status to **Accepted**. This will communicate with the Donor that you will navigate to the pickup address to coordinate package logistics.
donationDetails.expiredDesc: This surplus food listing is expired and cannot be accepted or collected further.
donationDetails.onlyRegistered: Only registered NGOs or Volunteers can claim or accept donations.
donationDetails.successClaim: You have successfully accepted/claimed this food donation!

profile.logoutSub: Logout from FoodBridge securely. Your listings and logs remain intact.
